Who We Are

STRATEGY
MEETS
SEDUCTION.

Founded by Petronela Daniela Solovastru — luxury marketing consultant, verified influencer, and former Deloitte strategist — SOLOVASTRU is a global marketing consultancy specialising in high-end brands, personal branding, and transformational influence.

We work at the intersection of strategy, culture, and storytelling — building desire around brands that deserve to lead.

This is not traditional marketing. This is influence engineered for luxury.
Let's Collaborate

Why SOLOVASTRU

BOUTIQUE.
STRATEGIC.
OBSESSED.

  • Expertise from Deloitte & BNP Paribas
  • Verified influencer with global reach
  • Trusted by the world's most iconic brands
  • Deep understanding of the luxury consumer
  • Fully bespoke, client-first approach
  • Corporate strategy meets creative expertise

Core Values

WHAT WE STAND FOR

01
INTEGRITY

We operate with radical transparency and unwavering honesty — in every strategy, every campaign, every client relationship. Trust is the foundation of luxury.

02
INNOVATION

We never repeat the same formula. Each brand deserves a bespoke approach — one that pushes boundaries and sets new standards in aspirational storytelling.

03
RESULTS

Strategy without outcomes is just noise. Everything we build is engineered for measurable impact — visibility that converts, influence that endures.

Our Services

BOUTIQUE WORK FOR BRANDS READY TO LEAD.

01
Luxury Brand
Strategy
Positioning luxury brands with precision — defining the narrative, the tone, and the presence that commands desire.
→
02
Photography
From lifestyle and travel to brand and product shoots — imagery that tells a story and captures attention in a single frame.
→
03
Videography
Cinematic video production for social media, campaigns, and storytelling. From concept to final edit, ideas come to life through motion.
→
04
Marketing
Strategy
Defining your voice, understanding your audience, and building strategies that drive real results — not just visibility, but impact.
→
05
Social Media
& Branding
Content planning, visual identity, and storytelling designed to grow your presence and create meaningful engagement.
→
06
Web
Development
Modern, responsive websites combining clean design with strong performance. Built to reflect your brand and convert visitors into clients.
→
07
Creative
Direction
Guiding the visual and conceptual direction of projects — ensuring consistency, originality, and strong brand identity across every platform.
→

The Journey

A LEGACY OF EXCELLENCE.

With a background at Deloitte Belgium and BNP Paribas, leading organisational transformation projects focused on human capital and business evolution, Petronela brings unparalleled strategic expertise into the luxury marketing world.

As a verified influencer with a niche in sports, wellness, high-end fashion, jewellery, beauty, and luxury travel — she bridges corporate strategy and aspirational storytelling. Her audience is loyal, affluent, and aspirational.

✦ Luxury Marketing Consultant
✦ Verified Influencer
✦ Former Deloitte Strategist
✦ Brand Consultant
